description_long: This is a two-story brick house with a symmetrical, rectangular layout and a prominent central entryway. The facade features large bay windows on both floors, allowing ample natural light into the main living spaces. The house is surrounded by a low brick wall and a gated entrance, with landscaped gardens and flowering trees flanking the front path. The roof is flat, bordered by a parapet, and the windows are arranged in regular, symmetrical rows. The entryway is marked by double wooden doors and a small set of steps, giving the house a stately, formal appearance. The rear and side yards are also landscaped, providing additional green space and privacy.
description: A stately two-story brick house with large bay windows, a flat roof, and landscaped gardens enclosed by a brick wall and gate.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway with double doors, bay windows, and landscaped gardens with flowering trees.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the flat roof, symmetrical window arrangement, and green side yard with trees.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back garden, additional bay windows, and the brick wall enclosing the property.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the side yard, more flowering trees, and the regular window pattern.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical rows with large bay windows
attribute_entryway_design: Central double wooden doors with steps, flanked by bay windows and a gated brick entry with decorative landscaping
